description: Add a 'Cartas' hexagonal button to the PoliticsTrack bar (far right) and implement a large popup/modal that displays all available season cards with attractive card layout, color-coded types, cost, effect text, and image placeholder
steps: Create a new component src/components/SeasonCardsModal.tsx that: (1) receives open/onClose props, (2) reads gameState.seasonCardsDeck filtered by gameState.currentSeason from useGameStore, (3) renders a fixed backdrop overlay (following kami-modal-backdrop pattern from App.css), (4) shows a grid of cards (3-4 per row), (5) each card shows: name, cost with coin icon, type badge with color coding (monster=#9b59b6, virtue=#c8a951, upgrade=#3498db, warUpgrade=#e74c3c, winterUpgrade=#5bc0eb), effect text, force if applicable, and a placeholder area for future images, (6) close via X button or clicking the backdrop, (7) scrollable content area

Modify src/components/PoliticsTrack.tsx to: (1) add a useState for modal open state, (2) add an elongated hexagonal button at the far right end of the politics-track div (after the exhausted mandates section or after the war icon), (3) the button should display 'Cartas' text and the kanji character '旭', (4) on click it opens the SeasonCardsModal, (5) import and render SeasonCardsModal conditionally

Add CSS styles to src/App.css for: (1) .season-cards-btn - elongated hexagonal shape button with feudal Japanese styling using clip-path for hexagon shape stretched horizontally, gold/dark theme matching the app, (2) .season-cards-modal-backdrop - fixed overlay similar to kami-modal-backdrop, (3) .season-cards-modal - large modal container with scroll, (4) .season-card-grid - CSS grid with 3-4 columns, (5) .season-card - individual card styling with border-left colored by type, card header, type badge, cost display, effect text area, image placeholder area, (6) responsive design
Add i18n keys to src/i18n/en.ts and src/i18n/es.ts for any new translatable strings (e.g., 'seasonCardsModal.title', 'seasonCardsModal.close', card type labels can reuse existing market.* keys)
acceptance_criteria: An elongated hexagonal button with 'Cartas' text and '旭' kanji appears at the far right of the PoliticsTrack bar
Clicking the button opens a large modal/popup overlay
The modal displays all cards for the current season in a grid layout (3-4 per row)
Each card shows: name, cost (with coin styling), type badge with appropriate color, effect text, and an image placeholder area
Color coding: monster=purple, virtue=gold, upgrade=blue, warUpgrade=red, winterUpgrade=light blue
Modal can be closed via X button or clicking the backdrop
Modal content is scrollable when cards overflow
Build passes: npx tsc -b && npx vite build succeeds without errors
verification: Run 'npx tsc -b' in the project root to confirm no TypeScript errors
Run 'npx vite build' in the project root to confirm the bundle builds successfully
findings: Implemented all 5 Train mandate fixes: (1) Confirmation popup now uses position:fixed for viewport-centered display regardless of scroll. (2) Resolution order now uses players array (seating order) instead of turnOrder (honor order). (3) Player turn indicator shows 'Elige carta - PlayerName (ClanName)' with Aceptar button; cards are not interactable until accepted; resets when trainResolutionIndex changes. (4) Auto-close modal on train completion via store and PoliticsTrack useEffect. (5) Skip Purchase button visible after player confirms turn.
